title: Behind the Try: A Try Guys Documentary
original_title: Behind the Try: A Try Guys Documentary
overview: Over the course of their first-ever live tour, Keith, Ned, Zach, and Eugene confront the tension between their personal aspirations and their collective goals. Is this the start of a new future or the last hurrah?
